items.title: 假笑开箱
items.description: 成人像高端礼物一样躺在丝带礼盒里，对镜头维持得体微笑。
items.prompt: high-concept editorial photography, overhead view of an adult woman carefully packaged inside a luxury gift box, satin ribbons, tissue paper, price tag sticker, fake polite smile, limbs arranged like premium merchandise, soft department-store lighting, consumer identity critique, realistic human skin and fabric detail, clean background, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 工位礼品装
items.description: 把办公室白领包装成可以被挑选的职场礼盒。
items.prompt: surreal workplace editorial, top-down shot of a tired office worker packaged inside an open cardboard gift box placed in a gray cubicle, keyboard, badge lanyard, ribbon crossing the chest, shipping label aesthetic, forced smile, beige corporate atmosphere, sharp realistic details, visual metaphor of labor as product, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 粉弓试穿版
items.description: 像时装店展示品一样被包装的大人，带一点讨好式精致。

items.title: 待发货的人

items.title: 生日拆人现场

items.title: 橱窗情侣套装

items.title: 电商泡棉内胆

items.title: 婚礼回礼新娘
items.description: 把新娘拍成一件被精心包装的社会期待。

items.title: 自我关怀礼盒人
items.description: 把流行的自我关怀消费拍成一种温柔包装。

items.title: 七天可退换
items.description: 把“可被喜欢”延伸到可被退货的荒诞感。
